prerequisites.value: Sonic Croak, Throat Pouch, boggard, terrifying croak.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you use your terrifying croak ability, instead of imparting its normal effect you can choose to stun one creature within 30 feet for 1 round. If the target succeeds at a Fortitude save, it is instead staggered for 1 round. The DC of this Fortitude save is the same as that of your terrifying croak ability.
